qa_pairs.question: How do I load AmberTools 21 for CPU-only calculations under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load the modules `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run AmberTools 21 with GPU support using CUDA 11.4 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load the modules `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.

qa_pairs.question: Which libraries are used with AmberTools 21 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: AmberTools 21 under StdEnv/2020 uses GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: What modules should be loaded for CPU-only Amber version 20.12-20.15 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.12-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: How can I run Amber 20.12-20.15 with GPU acceleration using CUDA 11.4 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.12-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: Which libraries are used by Amber 20.12-20.15 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 20.12-20.15 under StdEnv/2020 uses GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: What is the module loading command for CPU-only Amber 20.9-20.15 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Use `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.9-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are needed for GPU-accelerated Amber 20.9-20.15 with CUDA 11.0 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.9-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: Which libraries are associated with Amber 20.9-20.15 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 20.9-20.15 under StdEnv/2020 uses GCC, MKL, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load Amber 18.14-18.17 for CPU execution under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/18.14-18.17`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required for GPU-accelerated Amber 18.14-18.17 with CUDA 10.2 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/8.4.0 cuda/10.2 openmpi/4.0.3`.

qa_pairs.question: Which libraries are used by Amber 18.14-18.17 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 18.14-18.17 under StdEnv/2020 uses GCC and MKL.

qa_pairs.question: What is the module loading command for CPU-only Amber 18 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/5.4.0 openmpi/2.1.1 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load Amber 18 for GPU-accelerated runs with CUDA 9.0.176 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/5.4.0 openmpi/2.1.1 cuda/9.0.176 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18`.

qa_pairs.question: What libraries are used by Amber 18 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 18 under StdEnv/2016 uses GCC and MKL.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are needed for CPU-only Amber 18.10-18.11 using GCC 5.4.0 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/5.4.0 openmpi/2.1.1 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18.10-18.11`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load Amber 18.10-18.11 for GPU-accelerated runs with CUDA 9.0.176 using GCC 5.4.0 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/5.4.0 openmpi/2.1.1 cuda/9.0.176 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18.10-18.11`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required for CPU-only Amber 18.10-18.11 using GCC 7.3.0 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/7.3.0 openmpi/3.1.2 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18.10-18.11`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load Amber 18.10-18.11 for GPU-accelerated runs with CUDA 9.2.148 using GCC 7.3.0 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016 gcc/7.3.0 cuda/9.2.148 openmpi/3.1.2 scipy-stack/2019a amber/18.10-18.11`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the notes for Amber 18.10-18.11 under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 18.10-18.11 under StdEnv/2016 uses GCC and MKL.

qa_pairs.question: Which clusters support Amber 16, and what are its limitations?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber 16 is available only on Graham, and some Python functionality is not supported.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load Amber 16 for CPU-only runs under StdEnv/2016?
qa_pairs.answer: Load `StdEnv/2016.4 amber/16`.

qa_pairs.question: On which clusters is the AmberTools 21 module currently available?
qa_pairs.answer: The AmberTools 21 module is currently available on all clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What Molecular Dynamics (MD) engines are provided by AmberTools 21?
qa_pairs.answer: AmberTools 21 provides `sander, sander.LES, sander.LES.MPI, sander.MPI, sander.OMP, sander.quick.cuda, and sander.quick.cuda.MPI`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I set Amber environment variables after loading the AmberTools 21 module?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to `source $EBROOTAMBERTOOLS/amber.sh`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two versions of the amber/20 module?
qa_pairs.answer: The two versions of amber/20 modules are `20.9-20.15` and `20.12-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the key differences between amber/20.9-20.15 and amber/20.12-20.15?
qa_pairs.answer: Amber/20.9-20.15 uses MKL and cuda/11.0, while amber/20.12-20.15 uses FlexiBLAS and cuda/11.4.

qa_pairs.question: Why is FlexiBLAS preferred over MKL for some CPU architectures?
qa_pairs.answer: MKL libraries do not perform well on AMD CPU, and FlexiBLAS solves this problem by detecting CPU type and using libraries optimized for the hardware.

qa_pairs.question: Which CUDA version is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: cuda/11.4 is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: What MD programs are available in CPU-only AmberTools/20 modules?
qa_pairs.answer: CPU-only modules provide all MD programs available in AmberTools/20 plus `pmemd (serial)` and `pmemd.MPI (parallel)`.

qa_pairs.question: What additional MD programs do GPU modules provide for Amber 20?
qa_pairs.answer: GPU modules add `pmemd.cuda (single GPU)` and `pmemd.cuda.MPI (multi - GPU)`.
